text: This video demonstrates the feasibility of laparoscopic assisted techniques in bulky colon cancer.

The surgeon employs a lateral-to-medial approach to address the bulky sigmoid colon tumor, a technique beneficial for managing large tumors.
We find the lateral-to-medial approach useful, particularly in bulky tumors.
